results.label: First ever message
results.message: Hello I want to start using bizpulse
results.response:
Hey Ngozi! Welcome 🎉

I'm Kemi, your BizPulse assistant. Think of me as your business partner right here on WhatsApp.

I help you track your sales, stock, expenses, and profit — no spreadsheet, no stress. Just tell me what's happening in your shop and I'll handle the numbers.

You can say things like "sold 3 Milo tins for 800 each" or "Emeka owes me 5k" or "how did I do today?" and I'll sort it out.

So tell me — what happened in the shop today? 😊
results.note: First message — Kemi should introduce herself by name

results.label: Goal setting
results.message: I want to make 500k this month
results.response:
Goal set! ₦500,000 revenue this month — we go get there.

Every sale you log brings you closer. Start telling me what you're selling and I'll track your progress 💪
results.note: Trader sets monthly revenue goal

results.label: Opening stock log — multi item pidgin

results.response:
Everything don land ✅

10 cartons Indomie
5 cartons Peak Milk
20 bottles Coke
3 bags Rice (50kg)

Your shelves don full! Now let's start selling 😄 Tell me anytime customer buys something and I go track am.

Rest well, tomorrow go better.
